Defend forward on Phase Line IRON.
Three IN BNs on-line, armour in depth.
Artillery in general support. Accept risk
on flanks; mass combat power at FEBA.
Two IN BNs forward, one in depth as
engagement areas. Obstacle plan tied to
fires. BFSB forward for early warning.
One BN fixing force; two BN strike
force. Draw enemy into kill sack then
COA-2 Defense in Depth recommended. Superior flexibility and risk management. Obstacle / fires integration
enables sustained defense. Counterattack force preserved. Projected civilian incident rate: zero.
